channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Women with PMOS face four times higher heart disease risk, study finds
item.description: A study published in The Lancet Obstetrics, Gynaecology, & Women’s Health has revealed that women with polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome (PMOS) face a fourfold increased risk of developing hear...

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha Threatens Gulf Coast with Flooding and Strong Winds
item.description: Tropical Storm Bertha has formed in the northeastern Gulf of Mexico and is expected to impact portions of the Gulf Coast from Florida to Louisiana, potentially reaching as far west as Texas. The storm...

item.title: KPMG Appoints New CEO Amid Job Cuts and Scandal Fallout
item.description: KPMG Australia has appointed John Sams as its new chief executive, effective immediately, as the firm prepares for significant workforce reductions following a whistleblower scandal that has damaged i...

item.title: Zanzibar Hosts Thousands at FIFA World Cup Final Fan Zone
item.description: The Zanzibar Fan Zone campaign concluded with a major event at Kisonge, where thousands of football fans gathered to watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup final between Spain and Argentina. Organized by digit...

item.title: Federal court directs Edmonton Institution for Women to improve temperature monitoring and pursue air conditioning in secure unit
item.description: A Federal Court judge has ordered Correctional Service Canada (CSC) to take concrete steps to address longstanding concerns about extreme heat in the secure unit at the Edmonton Institution for Women....

item.title: AUKUS Inquiry in Adelaide Sparks Debate Over Security and Environmental Concerns
item.description: The article details the ongoing AUKUS inquiry in Adelaide, focusing on the potential environmental and security implications of the alliance's initiatives. Experts and stakeholders are scrutinizing th...

item.title: Border Czar Tom Homan defends ICE actions amid controversy over fatal incidents
item.description: Tom Homan, President Donald Trump's border czar, sparked controversy during a press briefing at the White House by making contentious claims about ICE-related fatalities. Discussing the deaths of Lore...

item.title: Global loneliness is widespread, but research shows a more complex picture than an epidemic
item.description: New research examining data from more than 218,000 people across nearly 150 countries challenges the idea that the world is experiencing a simple and universal loneliness epidemic. The study found tha...

item.title: New Orleans Police Department Releases Draft Policy Allowing Weaponized Drones, Despite Current Ban
item.description: A draft New Orleans Police Department (NOPD) drone manual, briefly published online, would have allowed police drones to carry weapons with written approval from the superintendent, according to 404 M...

item.title: Andrew Tate and Brother Tristan Face UK Extradition Battle Over Sex Crime Charges
item.description: Andrew Tate and his younger brother Tristan are challenging their extradition to the United Kingdom over allegations of sex crimes, including rape, sex trafficking, and assault. Their lawyer, Joseph M...

item.title: Mexican Drug Lord El Mayo Gets Life Sentence in U.S. Court for Cartel Leadership
item.description: Ismael Zambada, known as 'El Mayo,' the former top associate of Joaquin 'El Chapo' Guzman, has been sentenced to life in prison by a U.S. court for his role in leading the Sinaloa cartel. The 76-year-...

item.title: Melatonin Offers Modest Relief for Chronic Muscle and Joint Pain
item.description: A study suggests melatonin may provide mild relief for chronic muscle and joint pain, though its effects are limited. Researchers analyzed 23 clinical trials involving over 2,000 participants, finding...

item.title: Vanilla Reigns as America's Most Popular Ice Cream Flavor in 2025
item.description: A comprehensive analysis of U.S. ice cream preferences reveals that vanilla remains the undisputed leader, dominating sales across all regions. According to data from Instacart and Google search trend...

item.title: Top Spanish Cities for Travelers Inspired by World Cup Victory
item.description: The article highlights Spain's appeal as a tourist destination, particularly after its recent World Cup triumph. It recommends key cities like Barcelona, Madrid, Seville, and San Sebastián, emphasizin...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Feng Shui Insights for July 21, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Feng Shui predictions for July 21, 2026, provided by Master Hanz Cua. It highlights how these predictions aim to guide individuals in aligning their energies with cosmic forces f...

item.title: Minister Explains Debt Surge: Naira Depreciation, Not Fresh Borrowing
item.description: The Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy, Taiwo Oyedele, explained that Nigeria’s public debt increase since the Tinubu administration took office is mainly due to naira deprec...

item.title: Commentator faces backlash for mistakenly calling A$AP Rocky 'AKA Rocky' during live commentary
item.description: The incident occurred when a commentator incorrectly referred to A$AP Rocky as 'AKA Rocky,' sparking online mockery and criticism. This mix-up highlights the importance of accuracy in public-facing ro...

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Teases Epic Battle with Doctor Doom and Marvel's Biggest Ensemble Cast
item.description: Marvel has released the first official trailer for Avengers: Doomsday, setting the stage for the MCU's most anticipated battle yet. The action-packed preview showcases a massive ensemble cast includin...

item.title: Zandile Gumede's political shift and eThekwini mayoral candidacy under scrutiny
item.description: The uMkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP) in KwaZulu-Natal is awaiting final approval from party leader Jacob Zuma and Secretary-General Sibonelo Nomvalo on whether Zandile Gumede will be their mayoral candida...

item.title: New UK PM Andy Burnham reshapes government with cabinet overhaul and economic reforms
item.description: New UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham has taken charge, immediately restructuring his predecessor's cabinet to signal a shift in leadership. The 56-year-old Labour leader, who became PM after replacing K...
